messages.content:
Create a strict JSON scrape plan for a job scraper script.
The plan must support one of these strategies: api, json, html, spa.
Use the investigation payload as the source of truth. Do not infer new selectors or URLs unless the payload is empty.
Use structural extraction only. No regex. Missing fields should be null.
Return keys: strategy, entry_url, output_path, pagination, listing, detail, filters, notes.
Use JSON paths as arrays of keys/indices. Use CSS selectors for HTML extraction.
Context: {"domain": "f22labs.com", "investigation": {"source_type": "spa", "careers_url": "https://f22labs.zohorecruit.in/jobs/Careers", "platform": "zoho_recruit", "api_url": null, "jobs_found_during_investigation": true, "job_count_detected": 2, "job_titles": ["Senior Project Manager", "Product Management Intern"], "listing_selector": "div[class~=\"cw-filter-joblist-left\"]", "job_selector": "div[class~=\"cw-filter-joblist-left\"]", "detail_selector": "p[class~=\"filter-subhead\"][class~=\"cw-bw\"]", "recommended_strategy": "beautifulsoup", "json_paths": [], "selectors": {"listing": {"items_selector": "div[class~=\"cw-filter-joblist-left\"]", "title_selector": "a[class~=\"cw-3-title\"][class~=\"cw-bw\"]", "url_selector": "a[class~=\"cw-3-title\"][class~=\"cw-bw\"]", "location_selector": "p[class~=\"filter-subhead\"][class~=\"cw-bw\"]", "description_selector": null, "date_posted_text_selector": null, "employment_type_selector": null, "work_type_selector": null, "salary_range_selector": null}, "detail": {"description_path": ["description"]}, "pagination": {"type": "link", "page_param": null}}, "pagination": {"type": "link", "text": "blog", "href": "https://www.f22labs.com/blogs/?category=Headless%20Shopify&page=1", "rel": ["noopener", "noreferrer"]}, "listing": {"items_selector": "div[class~=\"cw-filter-joblist-left\"]", "title_selector": "a[class~=\"cw-3-title\"][class~=\"cw-bw\"]", "url_selector": "a[class~=\"cw-3-title\"][class~=\"cw-bw\"]", "location_selector": "p[class~=\"filter-subhead\"][class~=\"cw-bw\"]", "json_items_path": []}, "detail": {"url_path": ["url"], "description_path": ["description"]}}}
